body.title: DickSimnel: e2e smoke test — real OR call + tool_calls + DONE: verified
body.result: _turn_log added to ToolLoop; TestToolLoopLiveOR class with skip-unless-env; 2 unit tests; integration mark registered
body.intention: I intend that we have a live integration test confirming qwen3-coder-30b returns tool_calls on OR and the ToolLoop→DONE:→close cycle completes end-to-end.
body.description:
**Problem:** All 85 DickSimnel tests mock InferenceDevice. Whether qwen3-coder-30b on OpenRouter actually returns OpenAI-format tool_calls is unverified. The DONE:→close cycle has never completed in production.

**What to build:** An integration test (skip-by-default unless env var DICKSIMNEL_LIVE_OR=1 is set) that:
1. Constructs a minimal dummy ticket {id: T-smoke-test, title: 'echo hello', description: 'Run: echo hello via Bash tool and return DONE: hello echoed'}
2. Calls ToolLoop.run() with real InferenceDevice (no mock)
3. Asserts response is not None AND starts with 'DONE:'
4. Asserts at least one tool_calls entry appeared in the transcript (via a ToolLoop trace)

This confirms OR returns tool_calls for this model and the loop terminates correctly.

**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_toolloop.py (new @pytest.mark.integration class), devices/dicksimnel/toolloop.py (add turn_log to ToolLoop.run() return path for test inspection)
**Design rules:** none apply (test-only, no prod code changes except optional turn_log)
**Scope boundary:** Integration smoke test only; does not fix any production bugs
**Completion criteria:** pytest -m integration tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_toolloop.py::TestToolLoopLiveOR passes when DICKSIMNEL_LIVE_OR=1; asserts DONE: prefix and tool_calls presence
